title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 251.100 - Office of department to be in Jefferson City
text:
251.100.  Office of department to be in Jefferson City. — The division of facilities management, design and construction shall furnish office space for the department, the headquarters of which department shall be located in Jefferson City, Missouri.
(L. 1967 p. 357 § 10, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision)
